title: Maximum Non Negative Product in a Matrix
hints: Since you can only move right or down, the path to any cell depends only on the cells immediately above and to its left.
Because negative numbers flip signs, track both the maximum and minimum products reaching each cell to handle sign changes.
The value at (0,0) is the base case; for other cells, the max/min depends on whether the current cell value is positive, negative, or zero.
